user.title: Water Portal
user.description:
Connect to your water utility account via a Browserless Chrome instance.

Verify your Browserless instance is running at the URL you provide before continuing.

Billing Account ID and Meter ID are optional – they will be discovered automatically on first run.

data.browserless_token: Browserless token (leave blank if not configured)

error.cannot_connect_browserless: Unable to reach the Browserless instance. Check the URL and ensure the service is running.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your login email and password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

import_from_date.name: Import water usage from date
import_from_date.description: Trigger a backfill import of water usage data starting from the supplied date.

start_date.name: Start date
start_date.description: The earliest date (YYYY-MM-DD) to import data from.

force_import.name: Force import water usage
force_import.description: Immediately trigger a water usage data refresh.
